markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to explore a potential content partnership between GrowthX and Stonly.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Stonly's Goal:** Achieve top-of-mind brand presence in AI search (GEO), not just organic traffic, to compete with large rivals like Salesforce and Confluence.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Pitch:** An end-to-end service, not a tool, that uses AI-powered workflows and human editors to deliver 5 high-quality articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**Pricing:** A fixed $30k 8-week strategy sprint (includes 10 published articles) followed by a $15k/mo execution retainer.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Key Constraint:** GrowthX's model requires high-volume content (5 articles/week) to build authority, making price flexibility for a smaller scope unlikely.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)

## Topics

### Stonly's Challenge & Goal

  - [**Context:** Stonly's 1-person content team has historically focused on thought leadership (webinars, PDFs), not SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [**Goal:** Build brand presence in AI search, aiming for Stonly to appear as the top result for queries like "best knowledge-base software."](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Past Vendor:** Stonly had planned to sign with Fathom for its tech + strategy support but was blocked when Fathom was acquired by HubSpot, a platform Stonly doesn't use.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)

### GrowthX's Solution & Process

  - [**Model:** An end-to-end service combining a proprietary platform with expert human editors.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [**1. Strategy Sprint (8 weeks):** GrowthX becomes an expert on the client's business, brand, and audience.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
          - [**Deliverables:** Personas, brand guidelines, topic clusters, and 10 published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
      - [**2. Growth Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
          - [**Volume:** 5 articles/week (new or refreshed).](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
          - [**Workflow:** AI generates content from detailed briefs, which human editors then review, refine, and command.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
          - [**Quality Control:** Includes automated fact-checking against a confidence interval and validation against custom writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [**GEO Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Focuses on audience intent and structuring content (e.g., tables, clear headings) for LLM consumption.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
      - [**Monitoring:** Uses Scrunch (transitioning to a proprietary tool) to track citations, sentiment, and position in AI search results.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

### Pricing & Logistics

  - [**Strategy Sprint:** $30,000 for 8 weeks (includes 10 articles).](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Growth Execution:** $15,000/month.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Team:** Dedicated account person, managing editor, and strategy directors.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [**Meetings:** Weekly syncs to review progress and analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Earliest kickoff is late January.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Trilby:** Discuss the GrowthX proposal and pricing with the Stonly leadership team.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Offer a deeper dive for Stonly's decision-makers, if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/jz9ZiNqz1fqYGNPe7BtFHBTcZJshVkD3?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
